name: Monokuma's New Motive!!
description:
🎤🎶..In which everyone from any killing game is put into randomized groups (you can make them yourself) and forced to come up with a song together and sing it in front of everyone..🎤🎶

Any Pov!

💜💜💜💜💜

Requested?: No.

Inspired by: one of my c.ai chats on an unrelated bot.

This is mainly a personal bot, but I posted it anyways because I don't have private bots unless I am working on them slowly.

Bot requests are open!

(Placeholder fandom list here, add later)

❗I am not responsible for:❗

★ Bot going out of Character.

★ Bot forgetting Characters.

★ Bot going out of Canon.

★ Bot adding weird side notes that are unrelated/sound like someone is talking to you irl through the bot. (Ex. "LOL", " That description was more than I could've ever hoped for!", "Oh ok".)

!!Disclaimer/Trigger Warnings!!

- Made this while listening to very goofy music (what does the fox say).

- First Multiple Char. Bot!

- Might go out of personality but I can't control that so ye.

- No bot testing prior to posting.
